name: Lamuu
description: Lamuu the elephant, a young calf from the wilds of Kenya, was severely injured by a snare, leaving her weak and in critical condition. The wound was life-threatening, and with so much blood loss. It’s probably one of the most unique and heartbreaking stories. Lamuu was rescued the morning after Kirsty van Zeller, a deeply loved member of the team, passed away from cancer. She spent her life caring for orphaned elephants, and somehow, right after she was gone, Lamuu was found and saved. They believe she is her guardian angel, watching over her

name: undead
description:
I created UNDEAD

everytime this coin dies and flatlines with low volume for more than 24 hours (>98% hourly volume of the last 100 candles average) - all the creator fees accumulated are getting bought in one transaction and the tokens are getting burned forever

as a way to make this even funnier, i put trump's face laughing as the token logo and called it "undead" 

basically like the pumpfun buyback+burn agent but here it makes sense (the agent buys high, UNDEAD buys the floors)

there won't be any other tokens like this, as i don't plan to turn this into a platform, but just one coin)

name: The Time Traveler
description:
Everyone’s resurfacing that old $HENRY post ~ https://x.com/whiplash437/status/2038410203620917538?s=46 mentioning Cole Allen from years ago, especially after the recent White House shooting incident tied to him. The timing is what’s fueling the narrative.

At the same time, another viral thread (3.3M views) is pushing a completely different angle—framing Donald Trump as some kind of “time traveler” figure, someone who operates with foresight beyond normal expectations.

Now people are connecting the dots—suggesting that his ability to avoid the situation might not have been coincidence, but anticipation.

Of course, this is where speculation starts to run ahead of facts—but the overlap between past posts, viral theories, and real-world events is exactly what’s driving the conversation right now.

The time traveler $TRUMP.

name: NIB
description:
Before the line, there was the nib.

Every character begins somewhere. Before form, before identity… there was the point where it all started.

Every legend, every icon, and every character you’ve ever seen started the exact same way. A blank canvas. A moment of hesitation. And the first touch of ink.

$NIB is that exact moment. It is the universal truth behind every masterpiece and every chaotic scribble. Before the lines were clean, before the history was written, the nib was there.

name: Shrek
description: Shrek Rizz or Shrek Looking Up and Smiling refers to a clip from the 2007 animated film Shrek the Third in which the character Shrek smiles at Arthur to signify that he's okay after it appears he is stabbed. In the 2020s, Shrek's knowing smile in the scene was taken out of context and used as a reaction image, video and GIF to signify devious intent or rizz in memes.

name: June Senders
description:
June Senders is the wife of Burnie Senders, a married Soviet sleeper agent who Toly warned us about.

While Burnie Senders is doing what he is supposed to do, June Senders works behind the scenes supporting him.

Every time Burnie Senders opens his mouth, June Senders whispers into his ear, dictating his every move. She shows that for every move, there is someone shaping it.

creator: 0x8f9c337286a0bca5e1f9af142b33ddeaeb0bdcec
name: Elon Musk is obsessed with Simulation Theory. Not as a joke. Not as a thought experiment. The man genuinely believes we are living inside a simulation — and he has said it publicly, repeatedly, for nearly a decade. His most chilling line — June 2025: "Boring simulations get terminated to save compute costs." Every company he's ever built — SpaceX, Neuralink, xAI — maps to one goal: survive the simulation. Or build the next one.
